ground_truth.title: Pest Control Coupons Sacramento CA | Pest Pros Pest Solutions
ground_truth.main_content: Pest Pros Pest Solutions offers special coupons and discounts for pest control services in Sacramento, CA. Current available offers include: 50% OFF Initial Service when you sign up for a monthly subscription service (valid Feb 1, 2024 - Dec 31, 2026, not valid on rodent control programs), $100 OFF Rodent Proofing when rodent proofing and trapping program are purchased together (valid Feb 1, 2024 - Dec 31, 2026), 50% OFF Initial Mosquito Service (valid Mar 1, 2024 - Dec 25, 2026, cannot be combined with other offers), and $100 credit for Refer A Friend program where you receive credit for every referral that signs up for monthly subscription (valid Mar 1, 2024 - Dec 31, 2026). Each coupon can be shared via text, email, or printed.
with: 50% OFF Initial Service when you sign up for a monthly subscription service
